comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Gate 1a: intent-aligned (nanosecond migration direction established by c578-c6cd). Fix: replace int(time.time()) with time.time_ns() in bridge scripts and ticket-conflict-log.py.
